rule.name: v2 Falco: suspicious network tool in container
rule.description: Falco rule 'Launch Suspicious Network Tool in Container' fired — nc, ncat, socat, nmap, telnet, etc. inside one of the playground role-host containers. Triage: which container, which process spawned the tool, what destination.
